title: New Default+ BetterEnd addon
description: Unofficial addon for BetterEnd mod which slightly improves texture consistency.
body:
Want to play with the New Default+ resource pack and the BetterEnd mod? Then this addon is for you! It slightly improves the consistency of textures, such as planks and ore blocks.

[Original New Default+ resource pack by SeaOfPixels](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/newdefaultplus)
